faqs.question: How often should I schedule mosquito treatments in East Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season (April through October) in East Elmhurst. faqs.question: What areas of my East Elmhurst property will you treat for mosquitoes?
faqs.answer: We treat all mosquito breeding and resting areas on your East Elmhurst property, including yards, bushes, shrubs, under decks, around foundations, and standing water sources.
